enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs a morning in Boulder, recapping a late night of GIS/mapping work on building counts for Boulder County towns in Google Earth, a homeowners association meeting about a bike rack ticket, and dinner with his mom. He shares his excitement about a related project combining a Boulder County timeline with Roman land law research and Italian history.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Will do them within reason but won't repeat topics he's already covered
Suspects MSG in the Asian food made him feel unwell
Comfortable working until nearly 4am and functioning on 6 hours of sleep

transcript.text: Good morning. I just got out of bed. I was working until 4 o'clock in the morning. Well, 3.40 to be exact.
And it's 9.30 now, so I guess I got six hours of sleep, but I'm totally rested, so.
Technically, technically I'm sober because I haven't smoked yet.
So this is what I look like when I'm sober.
That's what I sound like. It's pretty normal, pretty much the same.
But since I'm sober, let's have a bong hit.
Okay, so yesterday I was working until from like 8 or something, but then I had like a nap for like a couple hours because I got to a point.
I was on the couch. I was at a point where I couldn't keep my eyes open, so I got in bed and I took a nap.
But I was working all day long.
But at 5.30, my mom reminded me I had to go to this like homeowner's meeting because like my roommate got a $25 ticket for having a bike rack in the garage.
So I had to go and talk to the homeowner, the work people, to see if it was okay if we could put a bike rack there.
So my mom picked me out and took me out on there. We talked to them for a little bit.
That was interesting. And then she took me out to dinner. I was like, you know what, I'm kind of hungry.
It was actually her idea. It was pretty cool.
But I think that it was Asian food and I think they had a little bit of MSG in it because I didn't feel all that great after.
But I didn't spend any money. It was pretty tasty.
So I worked on adding numbers to buildings all day yesterday.
It's a number of how many buildings are in the different towns in Boulder County.
I think I lost some work yesterday though too from it crashing.
Was that yesterday?
I don't know if it was yesterday.
But yeah, so today I'm going to paste everything together because I had to build it separately because it was crashing so much.
But I think it was crashing because I was accidentally keeping the footprints inside of the folder.
I should have kept them in its own folder.
All the buildings in Boulder County overheat the system.
So today I'm going to actually piece it together and see if I have enough features on the Google Earth to make it actually look like a cartoon world when you have this 100% solid layer on the bottom.
I do want to take the towns and create little satellite villagers and farmers with all of their exact farming sizes they got.
I've been listening to a book called the history of Roman law or something.
Roman land law.
And I want to memorize it.
I think it was only like 40 pages or something.
But it has all of the different land laws and describes them and the date and everything and the dates that all the towns were incorporated.
So, oh my God.
And like the, yeah, the result and how they came about to spell that out on the website, on the timeline.
That's what I want to do.
Like now I'm like totally fired up.
Yeah, so under the same umbrella that I'm working on now, it's the timeline just for Italy.
Timeline for Italy.
And then all the Google Earth stuff.
Mark Del Rio wanted me to do a request video about Tom Cruise, but somebody asked me to do a video about Tom Cruise like a month ago.
Mark Del Rio, and then I think it was Mark Del Rio wanted me to do a video about Barack Obama's 2008 State of the Union speech.
It kind of seems like he just wants me to do videos to do videos and to do videos over and over again to see if I remember.
I'll have to tell him that.
But no, I am still doing request videos, but it has to be within reason, you know, not like, let's, let's, let's, let's do a third video about what you think about pizza.
It's like, damn it, you motherfuckers, I already did that video.
Um, so, uh, yeah, it snowed, it's all snowy outside, so yeah.
Um, I'm super fired up today, I'm like, I'm super excited to see what, I can make this world look like, make it a totally different world right on top of here.
Boulder room.
Okay, peace out.
Do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do.
